title: LogLine
description: ECS-style structured log line. Every service logs JSON to stdout with these fields. Mirror of go/pkg/logger and @ting/logger.

message.description: Stable event name, e.g. http_request, item_created

request_id.description: Gateway-generated correlation id; propagated as X-Request-Id internally

trace_id.description: 32-hex trace id from W3C traceparent / OpenTelemetry

user_id.description: Actor user id when authenticated (from trusted identity headers)

url.path.description: Normalized route template; high-cardinality ids replaced with :id

event.duration.description: Duration in nanoseconds (Go slog) or use duration_ms in TS
